summary: Konekt Enrichment Patch v132 - All features verified. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Admin invoices show customer_name, payer_name, payment_status_label (human-readable), invoice_status, linked_ref. Admin orders-ops returns enriched rows with customer/sales/vendor/payer/approval fields. Admin order detail drawer shows fully enriched data. Customer invoices show payer_name and payment_status_label. Vendor orders API returns sales enrichment. Route redirects working correctly.

issues: Some invoices show '-' for Payer Name - this is expected for older invoices without payer info in payment_proofs collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: Konekt Enrichment Patch v132 fully tested. All features working: 1) GET /api/admin/invoices returns enriched invoices with customer_name (never null), payer_name, payment_status_label (human-readable: 'Paid in Full', 'Payment Under Review', 'Awaiting Payment'). 2) GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns enriched rows with customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, sales_name, sales_email, sales_phone, vendor_name, vendor_email, vendor_phone, payer_name, approved_at, approved_by. 3) GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns flat enriched fields plus nested invoice and payment_proof objects. 4) GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name (resolved from proof/submission/billing chain) and payment_status_label. 5) GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders with sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email enrichment. 6) adminApi.js getOrderDetail uses /api/admin/orders-ops/{id}. 7) Admin invoices table shows 9 columns: Date, Invoice No, Customer, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status, Invoice Status, Linked Ref. 8) Admin order drawer shows Customer, Assignment (Sales/Vendor), Payment (with Payer Name), Fulfillment sections. 9) Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column. 10) /dashboard redirects to /account. 11) /partner/fulfillment redirects to /partner/orders. 12) PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx is deleted. 13) serialize_doc preserves existing UUID 'id' field over ObjectId conversion.

admin_invoices_customer_name.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns customer_name field. Falls back to email/billing when user lookup fails.

admin_invoices_payer_name.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns payer_name field. Resolves from invoice → proof → billing → customer_name chain.

admin_invoices_payment_status_label.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns payment_status_label field with human-readable labels: 'Paid in Full', 'Payment Under Review', 'Awaiting Payment'. No raw codes with underscores.

admin_orders_ops_list_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns enriched rows with customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, sales_name, sales_email, sales_phone, vendor_name, vendor_email, vendor_phone, payer_name, approved_at, approved_by.

admin_orders_ops_detail_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns flat enriched fields plus nested invoice and payment_proof objects with payer_name.

customer_invoices_payer_name.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name field. Resolved from proof/submission/billing chain. Some show '-' for older invoices.

customer_invoices_payment_status_label.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payment_status_label field. Customer invoice table shows human-readable payment status badges.

vendor_orders_sales_enrichment.details: GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders with sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email enrichment.

admin_orders_table_columns.details: Admin orders table shows Customer, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor columns.

admin_order_drawer_enrichment.details: Admin order drawer shows Customer (Name, Email, Phone), Assignment (Sales Person, Vendor), Payment (Status, Payer Name, Approved By, Approval Date), Fulfillment sections.

customer_invoice_table_payer_name.details: Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column.

partner_fulfillment_page_deleted.details: PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx is deleted. No references found in codebase.

serialize_doc_preserves_id.details: serialize_doc in order_ops_routes.py preserves existing 'id' field over _id conversion.
